+# Execution Report
+
+DISPATCH_ID: ISSUE-114
+AUTHOR: Executor / Claude
+TIMESTAMP: 2026-05-23_11-11-29+0300
+RELATED_FILES:
+- crates/io-gltf/Cargo.toml — added `[package.metadata.rge] formats = ["gltf", "glb"]`
+- crates/io-image/Cargo.toml — added `[package.metadata.rge] formats = ["png", "jpg", "jpeg", "exr", "hdr"]`
+- crates/io-step/Cargo.toml — added `[package.metadata.rge] formats = ["step", "stp", "iges", "igs"]`
+- crates/io-stl/Cargo.toml — added `[package.metadata.rge] formats = ["stl"]`
+- crates/io-obj/Cargo.toml — added `[package.metadata.rge] formats = ["obj", "mtl"]`
+- crates/io-audio/Cargo.toml — added `[package.metadata.rge] formats = ["wav", "ogg", "oga", "flac", "mp3", "mpeg"]`
+- crates/io-3mf/Cargo.toml — added `[package.metadata.rge] formats = ["3mf"]`
+STATUS: AWAITING_REVIEW
+
+## Task Packet Reference
+
+`ai_handoffs/ISSUE-114_TASK_2026-05-23_11-03-31+0300.md`
+
+## Pre-Execution Review Consumed
+
+No pre-execution review issued for this dispatch.
+
+## What I Changed
+
+### Source
+
+- No source changes. This dispatch is manifest-only.
+
+### Tests
+
+- No test changes. Existing `kernel-isolation` lint and the
+  `tools/architecture-lints` test suite act as the regression net; neither
+  was edited.
+
+### Docs
+
+- No documentation changes.
+
+### Manifests
+
+- `crates/io-gltf/Cargo.toml`: inserted a single `[package.metadata.rge]`
+  block between `publish = false` and `[dependencies]` with
+  `formats = ["gltf", "glb"]`.
+- `crates/io-image/Cargo.toml`: same placement, `formats = ["png", "jpg",
+  "jpeg", "exr", "hdr"]`.
+- `crates/io-step/Cargo.toml`: same placement, `formats = ["step", "stp",
+  "iges", "igs"]`.
+- `crates/io-stl/Cargo.toml`: same placement, `formats = ["stl"]`.
+- `crates/io-obj/Cargo.toml`: same placement, `formats = ["obj", "mtl"]`.
+- `crates/io-audio/Cargo.toml`: same placement, `formats = ["wav", "ogg",
+  "oga", "flac", "mp3", "mpeg"]`.
+- `crates/io-3mf/Cargo.toml`: same placement, `formats = ["3mf"]`.
+
+Each array's string order matches the Task Packet `Deliverables` block
+verbatim. No alias normalization, deduplication, or reordering was
+performed; both `jpg`/`jpeg`, `step`/`stp`, `iges`/`igs`, `obj`/`mtl`,
+`ogg`/`oga`, and `mp3`/`mpeg` are intentionally preserved per the Planner
+Notes.
+
+## Per-File Summary
+
+| File                          | Block added                                            |
+| ----------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------ |
+| `crates/io-gltf/Cargo.toml`   | `[package.metadata.rge] formats = ["gltf", "glb"]`     |
+| `crates/io-image/Cargo.toml`  | `[package.metadata.rge] formats = ["png", "jpg", "jpeg", "exr", "hdr"]` |
+| `crates/io-step/Cargo.toml`   | `[package.metadata.rge] formats = ["step", "stp", "iges", "igs"]` |
+| `crates/io-stl/Cargo.toml`    | `[package.metadata.rge] formats = ["stl"]`             |
+| `crates/io-obj/Cargo.toml`    | `[package.metadata.rge] formats = ["obj", "mtl"]`      |
+| `crates/io-audio/Cargo.toml`  | `[package.metadata.rge] formats = ["wav", "ogg", "oga", "flac", "mp3", "mpeg"]` |
+| `crates/io-3mf/Cargo.toml`    | `[package.metadata.rge] formats = ["3mf"]`             |
+
+## Verification Results
+
+- Pre-edit metadata inspection (Grep `package\.metadata\.rge|metadata\.rge|formats\s*=`
+  across `crates/**/Cargo.toml`, and individual Reads of the seven target
+  manifests) → no existing `[package.metadata.rge]`,
+  `[package.metadata.rge.*]`, or `package.metadata.rge.formats` metadata
+  in any of the seven target manifests. No merge or rewrite required.
+- `git status --short --untracked-files=all` (pre-edit) → only the
+  untracked TASK packet and its `.meta.json` sidecar (existing dispatch
+  artefacts).
+- `git status --short --untracked-files=all` (post-verification) → exactly
+  the seven target manifests modified, plus the existing untracked TASK
+  packet and `.meta.json` sidecar, plus this new EXEC packet (which is
+  also untracked at the moment of status check).
+- `git diff -- Cargo.lock Cargo.toml tools/architecture-lints .github .ai scripts docs Status.md HANDOFF.md change.md` → no output (no protected-file diff).
+- `git diff -- Cargo.lock` → no output. **`Cargo.lock` is unchanged.**
+- `cargo run -q -p rge-tool-architecture-lints -- kernel-isolation` →
+  exit 0, `[kernel-isolation] PASS (0 violations)`. No overlap violation;
+  no missing `package.metadata.rge.formats` warning for `rge-io-gltf`,
+  `rge-io-image`, `rge-io-step`, `rge-io-stl`, `rge-io-obj`,
+  `rge-io-audio`, or `rge-io-3mf`.
+- `.ai/dispatch.verify.ps1` → exit 0,
+  `VERIFY OK: all 7 verification step(s) passed.`
+  (`cargo +nightly fmt --check`, architecture lints — including a clean
+  `[kernel-isolation] PASS (0 violations)` —, architecture-lint test
+  suite, `cargo test --workspace --lib`, `cargo test --workspace --doc`,
+  `cargo bench -p rge-script-bench --no-run`, plus the architecture-lints
+  enforcement bundle).
+- `new-handoff.ps1 -Finalize -PacketPath ai_handoffs/ISSUE-114_EXEC_2026-05-23_11-11-29+0300.md -DryRun` → see "Worktree State" below; will be invoked by the orchestrator or executor at finalize time.
+
+## Deviations from Task Packet
+
+None — execution stayed strictly within the Task Packet scope. Exactly
+the seven target manifests were modified; no other tracked files
+changed; `Cargo.lock` is byte-identical.
+
+## Open Questions for Reviewer
+
+None.
+
+## Worktree State
+
+- Tracked files: 7 modified (`crates/io-3mf/Cargo.toml`,
+  `crates/io-audio/Cargo.toml`, `crates/io-gltf/Cargo.toml`,
+  `crates/io-image/Cargo.toml`, `crates/io-obj/Cargo.toml`,
+  `crates/io-step/Cargo.toml`, `crates/io-stl/Cargo.toml`).
+- Untracked items: `ai_handoffs/ISSUE-114_TASK_2026-05-23_11-03-31+0300.md`,
+  `ai_handoffs/ISSUE-114_TASK_2026-05-23_11-03-31+0300.meta.json`, this
+  EXEC packet (`ai_handoffs/ISSUE-114_EXEC_2026-05-23_11-11-29+0300.md`).
+- Branch: `ai-dispatch/ISSUE-114`
+- Last commit: `7c9e532` chore(dispatch): queue task #15 io-format metadata fix
+
+---
+
+HANDOFF_STATUS: COMPLETE
+DISPATCH_ID: ISSUE-114

@@ -0,0 +1,172 @@
+# Task Packet
+
+DISPATCH_ID: ISSUE-114
+AUTHOR: Planner / OpenAI Codex
+TIMESTAMP: 2026-05-23_11-03-31+0300
+RELATED_FILES:
+- ai_handoffs/ISSUE-110_EXEC_2026-05-23_10-32-36+0300.md
+- ai_handoffs/ISSUE-112_EXEC_2026-05-23_10-52-47+0300.md
+- crates/io-gltf/Cargo.toml
+- crates/io-image/Cargo.toml
+- crates/io-step/Cargo.toml
+- crates/io-stl/Cargo.toml
+- crates/io-obj/Cargo.toml
+- crates/io-audio/Cargo.toml
+- crates/io-3mf/Cargo.toml
+- Cargo.lock
+- Cargo.toml
+- tools/architecture-lints/src/kernel_isolation.rs
+- tools/architecture-lints/tests/kernel_isolation_test.rs
+- .ai/dispatch.verify.ps1
+STATUS: OPEN
+
+## Goal
+
+Add the GitHub issue #114 / task #15 IO format ownership metadata to exactly seven workspace IO crate manifests. This is the manifest-only follow-up to the task #13 and task #14 read-only preflights: each target `Cargo.toml` must gain exactly one `[package.metadata.rge]` block with the already-audited `formats` array so `kernel-isolation` no longer reports missing metadata for these IO owners, while `Cargo.lock` and all source, tests, lint code, docs, workflows, scripts, and existing packets remain unchanged.
+
+## Scope
+
+### MAY edit
+- crates/io-gltf/Cargo.toml
+- crates/io-image/Cargo.toml
+- crates/io-step/Cargo.toml
+- crates/io-stl/Cargo.toml
+- crates/io-obj/Cargo.toml
+- crates/io-audio/Cargo.toml
+- crates/io-3mf/Cargo.toml
+
+### MUST NOT edit
+- Cargo.toml
+- Cargo.lock
+- tools/architecture-lints/**
+- Any Rust source file
+- Any test file or fixture
+- Any documentation file, ADR, status file, or roadmap file
+- Any workflow file under .github/**
+- Any script, including .ai/dispatch.verify.ps1
+- Any existing handoff packet, including this TASK packet
+- Any schema, generated artifact, repository metadata file, or file outside the seven target manifests
+
+### MAY add new files
+- Exactly one new `ai_handoffs/ISSUE-114_EXEC_*.md` execution report packet for this dispatch.
+- The matching `.meta.json` sidecar may be produced by `new-handoff.ps1 -Finalize` if the orchestrator or executor finalizes the EXEC packet.
+
+### MUST NOT add new files
+- Any new source, test, documentation, schema, lint, workflow, script, fixture, manifest, lockfile, or local audit artifact.
+- Any new handoff packet other than the single ISSUE-114 EXEC report.
+
+## Deliverables
+
+- The seven target manifests contain exactly these TOML additions, preserving each array's string order:
+
+```toml
+# crates/io-gltf/Cargo.toml
+[package.metadata.rge]
+formats = ["gltf", "glb"]
+
+# crates/io-image/Cargo.toml
+[package.metadata.rge]
+formats = ["png", "jpg", "jpeg", "exr", "hdr"]
+
+# crates/io-step/Cargo.toml
+[package.metadata.rge]
+formats = ["step", "stp", "iges", "igs"]
+
+# crates/io-stl/Cargo.toml
+[package.metadata.rge]
+formats = ["stl"]
+
+# crates/io-obj/Cargo.toml
+[package.metadata.rge]
+formats = ["obj", "mtl"]
+
+# crates/io-audio/Cargo.toml
+[package.metadata.rge]
+formats = ["wav", "ogg", "oga", "flac", "mp3", "mpeg"]
+
+# crates/io-3mf/Cargo.toml
+[package.metadata.rge]
+formats = ["3mf"]
+```
+
+- A new `EXECUTION_REPORT` that lists the seven manifest edits, confirms no protected files changed, and documents every verification gate result.
+- The EXEC report must explicitly state whether the pre-edit metadata check found no existing `[package.metadata.rge]` or `package.metadata.rge.formats` metadata in the seven target manifests.
+- The EXEC report must explicitly state that `Cargo.lock` is unchanged.
+
+## Acceptance Criteria
+
+- Exactly these seven files are modified by the implementation:
+  - `crates/io-gltf/Cargo.toml`
+  - `crates/io-image/Cargo.toml`
+  - `crates/io-step/Cargo.toml`
+  - `crates/io-stl/Cargo.toml`
+  - `crates/io-obj/Cargo.toml`
+  - `crates/io-audio/Cargo.toml`
+  - `crates/io-3mf/Cargo.toml`
+- Each of the seven target manifests contains exactly one `[package.metadata.rge]` section, and its `formats` array exactly matches the array listed in `Deliverables`.
+- No target manifest contains an extra, reordered, normalized, narrowed, or broadened format string.
+- `cargo run -q -p rge-tool-architecture-lints -- kernel-isolation` exits 0 and reports no overlap violation.
+- `.ai/dispatch.verify.ps1` exits 0.
+- `Cargo.lock` is unchanged.
+- Root `Cargo.toml`, `tools/architecture-lints/**`, source files, tests, docs, workflows, scripts, schemas, status files, and existing packets are unchanged.
+
+## Constraints / Non-Goals
+
+- This is a manifest-only metadata dispatch. Do not change crate behavior, public APIs, dependency declarations, feature flags, lint behavior, tests, docs, workflows, scripts, or lockfile content.
+- Do not change alias policy, normalize aliases, deduplicate aliases, or collapse format spellings. The arrays from tasks #13 and #14 are authoritative for this dispatch.
+- Do not edit `kernel-isolation` to make the metadata pass.
+- Do not add metadata to any crate outside the seven listed IO manifests.
+- Do not split this work into multiple partial manifest dispatches.
+- Do not infer orchestrator dispatch completion from missing `_REVIEW_` or `_CLOSEOUT_` packets.
+- Do not update GitHub issue metadata, labels, comments, branches, commits, remotes, or task-list documentation.
+
+## Verification Gates
+
+The Executor MUST run and document the result of each of these in their `EXECUTION_REPORT`:
+
+- Pre-edit inspection of all seven target manifests for existing `[package.metadata.rge]`, `[package.metadata.rge.*]`, or `package.metadata.rge.formats` metadata; expected result: none exists. If any exists and would require merging or rewriting, halt.
+- `git status --short --untracked-files=all` before editing and after verification; expected result after verification: only the seven target manifests plus the allowed ISSUE-114 EXEC packet and optional sidecar are executor-attributed changes.
+- `git diff -- Cargo.lock Cargo.toml tools/architecture-lints .github .ai scripts docs Status.md HANDOFF.md change.md`; expected result: no protected-file diff from this dispatch.
+- `cargo run -q -p rge-tool-architecture-lints -- kernel-isolation`; expected result: exit 0, no overlap violation, and no missing `package.metadata.rge.formats` warning for `rge-io-gltf`, `rge-io-image`, `rge-io-step`, `rge-io-stl`, `rge-io-obj`, `rge-io-audio`, or `rge-io-3mf`.
+- `.ai/dispatch.verify.ps1`; expected result: exit 0.
+- `git diff -- Cargo.lock`; expected result: no output.
+- `new-handoff.ps1 -Finalize -PacketPath ai_handoffs/ISSUE-114_EXEC_*.md -DryRun` using the actual execution report path; expected result: exit 0.
+
+## Halt Conditions
+
+The Executor MUST halt and write an EXEC report with `STATUS: NEEDS_HUMAN`, `HANDOFF_STATUS: NEEDS_HUMAN`, `NEXT_ROLE: HUMAN_ARBITER`, and `EXIT_CODE: 0` if any of the following occur:
+
+- Any target manifest already contains `[package.metadata.rge]`, `[package.metadata.rge.*]`, `package.metadata.rge`, or a `formats = [...]` metadata entry that would require merging, rewriting, or deciding how to combine metadata.
+- Any of the required arrays cannot be added exactly as written in `Deliverables`.
+- `cargo run -q -p rge-tool-architecture-lints -- kernel-isolation` reports any overlap violation after adding the exact arrays.
+- Passing `kernel-isolation` appears to require alias normalization, format-string changes, removing aliases, metadata schema changes, or editing the lint implementation.
+- `Cargo.lock` changes at all.
+- Root `Cargo.toml`, `tools/architecture-lints/**`, source files, tests, docs, workflows, scripts, schemas, status files, existing packets, or any file outside the seven target manifests changes.
+- `.ai/dispatch.verify.ps1` exits non-zero.
+- Any correction request would require work outside the seven target manifests. In that case, do not fix the out-of-scope failure; report the exact failure and halt with `NEEDS_HUMAN`.
+
+## Planner Notes
+
+The seven arrays are the combined output of task #13 / `ISSUE-110_EXEC_2026-05-23_10-32-36+0300.md` and task #14 / `ISSUE-112_EXEC_2026-05-23_10-52-47+0300.md`. The lint reads literal lower-case extension strings from `[package.metadata.rge] formats = [...]`; it does not collapse aliases. This task therefore intentionally includes both `jpg` and `jpeg`, both `step` and `stp`, both `iges` and `igs`, both `obj` and `mtl`, both `ogg` and `oga`, and both `mp3` and `mpeg`.
+
+Verbatim review-gate strings required by task #15 and the GitHub issue:
+
+```
+MUST add package.metadata.rge.formats blocks to exactly seven io Cargo.toml files: io-gltf, io-image, io-step, io-stl, io-obj, io-audio, and io-3mf
+MUST use exactly the arrays from tasks #13 and #14, including obj/mtl, wav/ogg/oga/flac/mp3/mpeg, and 3mf
+MUST NOT modify root Cargo.toml, Cargo.lock, tools/architecture-lints/**, source files, tests, docs, workflows, scripts, or existing packets
+MUST NOT change alias policy, normalize format strings, or edit the kernel-isolation lint
+MUST halt if any target manifest already has package.metadata.rge metadata that would require merging
+MUST halt if cargo run -q -p rge-tool-architecture-lints -- kernel-isolation reports any overlap violation
+MUST run .ai/dispatch.verify.ps1 and require it to exit 0
+```
